# Tyler Giroud

> Co-founder of Lectern. Partner at Presscart. Based in New York City.

## About

I spend a lot of time thinking about how AI is changing the way we discover information, interact in commerce, and what it means to build for an agent-to-agent environment.

I'm the co-founder of Lectern, where we're building the offsite content engine for AI agents. Providing brands, agencies, and AI visibility companies with effortless, programmatic offsite content via our media relationships.

I'm also a Partner at Presscart, a high-trust media marketplace where elite publications and independent journalists generate revenue by selling paid media opportunities to unique individuals, quality brands, and performance marketing agencies.

## Companies

- Lectern (https://trylectern.com): The offsite content engine for AI visibility. Built for brands, agencies, and platforms at the intersection of media relationships and AI agents.
- Presscart (https://presscart.com): A high-trust media marketplace that empowers elite publications and independent journalists to generate revenue by offering paid media opportunities to unique individuals, quality brands, and performance marketing agencies.

## Topics I Write About

- AI search and discovery
- AI visibility and offsite content
- Agent-to-agent commerce
- The state of startups
- Communications technology
- Media marketplaces

## Contact
